response.original_title: Datangmu Ku Benci Pergimu Ku Tangisi
response.overview: The story of a young man who has never lived in hardship since birth. But with just one accident, it changes his entire life from an ignorant person to a better human being. It tells of a man raised in luxury but falls into poverty after the death of both his parents. He is involved in an accident that causes the death of a husband. The wife of that husband forces the man to replace her husband by working to support their family and will not file a police report. The man is initially hated by the villagers but gradually they grow to like him.
response.title: Datangmu Ku Benci Pergimu Ku Tangisi
